block_01: If you were to ask us what we are proud of here at IQ Option, we would say that the platform’s availability in multiple languages is high on our list. For a long time, IQ Option has boasted 13 languages — that number has now grown to 14 with Vietnamese, which as of this week has become available. The good news doesn’t stop there: our library of promotional videos for mobile has also expanded. Read on to learn more!
block_03: What does the addition of Vietnamese mean for you? Higher conversions and even more traders from Vietnamese traffic. Our banners and landing pages in Vietnamese have been out for a while, and with Vietnamese now on the IQ Option platform, the puzzle is complete. We are certain this update will give you a huge advantage in persuading potential traders to try the platform.
block_04: If you’re not already targeting Vietnamese-speaking users, doing so is easy. We’ve got everything you need for your campaigns, all you have to do is choose your preferred promotional materials. For starters, check out our top-performing landing pages.
block_07: We’ve also got you covered when it comes to banners. Browse through them and select your favorite.
block_10: By the way, we are currently working on banners that will describe the minimum local deposit and platform language for each localization. They will appear in the Promo section of your account dashboard soon, so stay tuned and don't forget to visit it later!
block_12: Whether you’re looking to update your current campaigns or would like to work with new traffic, our newest releases could be just what you need. Those who turn to trading are in it to win it and make their dreams a reality — that’s what we aimed to portray in our latest videos. Head over to our Mobile Video section to check them out. Available in Portuguese, Turkish, Korean, Indonesian, and Hindi.
